name: Git Glide GUI
iteration_focus: v3.10.0 modular layout state model and explicit layout save policy
added: Modular layout state model independent of WinForms controls
UI-free GitLayoutState core module and Pester tests
Layout save policy: ask on exit, always save, or never save
Appearance tab controls for saving, discarding, resetting, and inspecting layout state
Layout documentation and v3.10.0 roadmap alignment
next_recommended: v3.10.1: collapsible panel host helpers and restorable panel collapsed state
v3.10.2: stackable workspace groups for history, recovery, integrate, metrics, and output panels
v3.10.3: dockable layout simulation with saved workspace profiles
v3.11.0: CI/CD and pull-request workflow integration
highlights: Separates layout intent from direct WinForms control manipulation
Keeps current splitters functional while adding a durable state model for future panel hosts
Lets users choose whether layout changes are saved automatically, never saved, or confirmed on exit
Prepares the GUI for collapsible, stackable, and dockable workspace panels without a risky UI rewrite
iteration_highlights: Extended Appearance tab with layout save/discard/reset controls
Updated static smoke checks for the layout state model
